name: Task Lamp  "(Includes LED Light Bulb)" - Threshold™
description:
Add a touch of elegance and functionality to your desk with this Task Lamp from Threshold™. This desk lamp boasts a ring design with integrated LED bulb and comes with metal body that can be adjusted to the desired height. The lamp features a holder on top to mount your tablet, smartphones and other gadgets and has a rotary switch to adjust the lighting to low, medium or high. Plus, the 5-foot cord length offers versatile placement options.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
